properties.name: Saldanha Bay
properties.description: 1er port export fer d'Afrique. 60 Mt/an vers Chine. Corridor Sishen-Saldanha (Transnet).

properties.name: Richards Bay
properties.description: 1er port charbonnier mondial (75 Mtpa). Charbon thermique export vers Asie / Europe.

properties.name: Nouadhibou
properties.description: Port mineralier SNIM (fer). 12 Mt/an. Liaison ferroviaire Zouerate 700 km.

properties.name: Kayar / Dakar Phosphates
properties.description: Terminal export phosphates ICS (Industries Chimiques du Senegal).

properties.name: Matadi
properties.description: Principal port Kongo Central. Transit cuivre/cobalt Katanga via rail vers Atlantique.

properties.name: Boma
properties.description: Port fluvio-maritime RDC. Export bois, minerais. En aval de Matadi.

properties.name: Kamsar
properties.description: 1er port bauxite mondial (CBG - Compagnie Bauxites de Guinee). Alumine Chine/Europe.

properties.name: Rio Kogon (SMB Winning)
properties.description: Nouveau terminal consortium chinois SMB Winning (2016+). Mine Simandou phase 2.

properties.name: Conakry
properties.description: Port multifonction, export bauxite et or. Hub CEDEAO ouest.

properties.name: Nacala (Moatize coal)
properties.description: Corridor charbon Moatize-Nacala (Vale -> Jindal). 18 Mtpa potentiel.

properties.name: Maputo (chrome/ferro)
properties.description: Export chrome et ferrochrome Zimbabwe. Corridor Maputo-Harare.

properties.name: Walvis Bay (uranium)
properties.description: Export uranium Rossing/Husab (CNNC/CGN chinois). 10% production mondiale.

properties.name: Takoradi (manganese/bauxite)
properties.description: Export manganese (Ghana Manganese Co) et bauxite. Liaison rail interieur.
